patterns_identified.summary: Multiple model error losses; overconfident on favorites that underperformed or games with Coors-style run environment.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Require recency-weighted splits (last 7 days) before publishing ML favorites at or above -165. Coors totals need explicit confirmation at time of pick.

adjustments_for_today: MANDATORY STEP 1 — PROBABLE PITCHERS: Before writing any card or overlay, web search 'MLB probable pitchers [date] rotowire site:rotowire.com' and confirm all 30 starters. Store the confirmed list. If a game has no confirmed starter, that game card gets awayPitcher or homePitcher = TBD, grade capped at C, zero K props, no ML chip.

MANDATORY STEP 2 — IL CHECK: After confirming probables, web search 'MLB IL transactions [date]' and cross-check every confirmed starter name against the IL list. Any pitcher on the IL cannot start. Replace with the confirmed emergency starter or TBD. This step caught Webb on IL (May 9 knee bursitis) which was missed today for 10 days.

MANDATORY STEP 3 — OVERLAY REBUILD: statcast_overlay.json must be rebuilt from scratch at every refresh using ONLY the web-confirmed starter names from Step 1. Never reuse the prior day overlay as a source of truth. The overlay is an output, not an input. Previous sessions hallucinated Ohtani (0.82 ERA), Wheeler, Strider, Gausman into the overlay — all wrong.

MANDATORY STEP 4 — CROSS-VALIDATION: After writing CLAUDE_DAILY_ANALYSIS and statcast_overlay.json, run a check: every awayPitcher and homePitcher name in CLAUDE_DAILY_ANALYSIS must exist as a key in statcast_overlay.json pitchers dict. Any mismatch = card is flagged, grade dropped to C, and the mismatch is logged in REFRESH_REPORT.md before push.

DATA SOURCE HIERARCHY (strict): (1) Web-confirmed probable pitchers page is the only authoritative source for starter identity. (2) Statcast MCP for pitch metrics once name is confirmed. (3) Never infer starter from rotation logic, previous overlay, or schedule MCP — schedule MCP does not return probablePitcher reliably.
ATL ML blowout 12 to 0; never publish a B tier favorite on a road game without confirming the starter is active and recent opponent contact rates.
CHC ML lost due to Imanaga disaster outing (8 ER in 4.1 IP); do not ride ML of a team whose starter is posting elevated hard-contact rates last 3 starts.
Wheeler scratched; confirm starter identity within 90 minutes of publishing any K prop or game-result pick.
TEX@COL total 13 blown through Under 9.5; Coors field totals require historical over rate check before taking under at any line below 11.
ATH ML narrow loss at LAA; avoid backing road favorite teams with negative recent form even at short odds.
BOS@KC total only 4 on Over 8 pick; verify recent scoring pace of both teams before publishing an Over in a division-rival pitcher matchup.
Winning angle: SD Under with Petco and elite starters (LAD@SD 1 total) — continue targeting low-run games at pitcher parks.
Winning angle: NYM@WSH Over delivered 23 runs; warm weather plus both bullpens thin is a reliable Over signal.
Grade B picks today: 5W-3L-1V. CHC ML and ATL ML were avoidable with better confirmation steps.
Grade C picks today: 3W-3L. Mixed but CLE ML +112 nailed. Continue plus-money C picks with strong matchup edge.
monitoring_list: Shota Imanaga next outing — 8 ER in 4.1 IP is alarming; avoid K props until velocity and whiff rate recover.
Wheeler status for next start — confirm he pitches before any PHI K prop.
ATL SP situation — who starts next series after unexpected non-Wheeler outing.
Coors Field totals — re-confirm wind direction and temp before any Under publication.
carryover_rules: NYY ML lean at Citi was wrong; NYM home field plus uncertainty on starter should have been a pass.
CHC ML lost to CWS 9 to 8; avoid laying heavy juice on NL teams in crosstown games with wind blowing out.
WSH plus money miss; BAL road struggles did not translate, confirm recent road splits before fading.
STL ML at home lost to KC shutout; Mikolas groundball profile did not generate strikeouts or runs.
